items.name: Targeted
items.effect: Attacks with this weapon ignore Evasion equal to your Precision.

items.name: Sharp
items.effect: Add your Precision to this weapon's Base Damage.

items.name: Wounding
items.effect: Add your Precision to this weapon's Bonus Damage.

items.name: Rebounding
items.effect: When this weapon deals damage, deal its Base Damage again. The second instance cannot be reduced.

items.name: Hunting
items.effect: Attacks with this weapon are Lucky Rolls.

items.name: Rooting
items.effect: When this weapon deals damage, the target cannot move until the end of the round.

items.name: Guarding
items.effect: When an attack targeting you misses, deal this weapon's standard damage to the attacker.

items.name: Agile
items.effect: While wielding this weapon, you may move on your Act in addition to your React movement.

items.name: Vorpal
items.effect: When this weapon deals damage, the target loses two Charges.

items.name: Reprieve
items.effect: When this weapon reduces a target to 0, remove one Affliction from yourself.

items.name: Swift
items.effect: When you make a standard attack, immediately make one more standard attack against the same target. The extra attack does not trigger this effect again.

items.name: Powerful
items.effect: Attacks with this weapon ignore Durability equal to your Power.

items.name: Brutal
items.effect: Add your Power to this weapon's Base Damage.

items.name: Mauling
items.effect: Add your Power to this weapon's Bonus Damage.

items.name: Sweeping
items.effect: When this weapon deals damage, the nearest other enemy takes this weapon's Base Damage.

items.name: Merciless
items.effect: Fellmark effects with this weapon are doubled.

items.name: Hooking
items.effect: When this weapon deals damage, pull the target one space toward you. If its movement is prevented, deal this weapon's Base Damage.

items.name: Vengeful
items.effect: When an enemy hits you, deal this weapon's standard damage to it.

items.name: Goring
items.effect: Attacks with this weapon ignore the target's Armor Stance entirely.

items.name: Siphoning
items.effect: When this weapon deals damage, take one of the target's Charges for yourself.

items.name: Emboldening
items.effect: When this weapon reduces a target to 0, gain temporary Vitality equal to your Power.

items.name: Afflicted
items.effect: When you inflict a Fellmark with this weapon, apply an Affliction of your choice. It replaces the weapon's innate Fellmark Affliction.

items.name: Ethereal
items.effect: Attacks with this weapon ignore Resistance equal to your Magic.

items.name: Potent
items.effect: Add your Magic to this weapon's Base Damage.

items.name: Blighting
items.effect: Add your Magic to this weapon's Bonus Damage.

items.name: Coursing
items.effect: When you successfully cast a spell, each enemy adjacent to you takes this weapon's Base Damage.

items.name: Honed
items.effect: Rolls of 5 also count as Fellmarks with this weapon.

items.name: Forceful
items.effect: When this weapon deals damage, push the target one space away from you. If its movement is prevented, deal this weapon's Base Damage.

items.name: Backlash
items.effect: When an enemy hits or misses you, the attacker takes this weapon's Base Damage.

items.name: Unflagging
items.effect: Treat your Fatigue as one rank lower while wielding this weapon.

items.name: Welling
items.effect: When this weapon deals damage, charge one additional tier.

items.name: Devouring
items.effect: When this weapon reduces a target to 0, restore Vitality equal to your Magic.

items.name: Blinking
items.effect: This weapon's Range becomes In Sight.
